<<Microsoft AI Ethics>>

Section 1
Microsoft leads tech.
They value trust.
Data stays safe.
Users come first.
Privacy matters most.
Security is key.
Systems work well.
No harm done.
Fairness guides all.
Transparency builds faith.

Section 2
AI helps people.
Tools aid work.
Code runs fast.
Algorithms learn much.
Models grow smart.
Data drives change.
Innovation sparks ideas.
Progress moves forward.
Solutions fix problems.

Section 3
Bias gets checked.
Errors get fixed.
Teams test hard.
Rules stop abuse.
Laws guide action.
Standards shape design.
Ethics drive choices.
Values shape code.
Principles guide work.
Care protects users.

Section 4
Privacy needs care.
Data needs guard.
Servers hold secrets.
Clouds keep files.
Access stays limited.
Logs track use.
Encryption hides info.
Security blocks threats.
Safety stops risks.
Trust grows strong.

Section 5
Fairness needs focus.

Inclusion opens doors.

Kindness builds bonds.
Empathy guides design.
Courage faces hard.

Section 6
Transparency shows how.
Clarity helps users.

Reports share facts.
Docs explain logic.

Policies set limits.
Rules define scope.

Checks verify truth.

Section 7
Accountability matters most.
Responsibility drives action.
Ownership ensures care.
Duty guides work.
Stewardship protects data.
Oversight monitors systems.
Audits find flaws.
Reviews catch errors.
Feedback improves tools.

Section 8
Society benefits much.
World needs help.
Tech serves good.
Future looks bright.
